tweets.text: The United States joins our G7 allies today in announcing a Code of Conduct for Organizations Developing Advanced AI Systems. This is a milestone in international governance to promote the safe, secure, and trustworthy development of AI worldwide.

Live Now: @SecBlinken delivers remarks at the launch of the 2023 U.S. Strategy and National Action Plan on Women, Peace, and Security, at the State Department. Also streaming at: https://t.co/xUayAlsS2R https://t.co/mujlcUsFIE

Live now: @SecBlinken testifies before the Senate Committee on Appropriations on “A Review of the National Security Supplemental Request” on Capitol Hill. Also streaming at: https://t.co/M5XIiyOYKY https://t.co/Wrv9QDo4cI

The Secretary’s Award for Corporate Excellence winners are working in partnership with local communities, investing in human capital, and adhering to the highest environmental and labor standards. More on the 5 U.S. companies that we’re honoring today: https://t.co/6zOHImjbrG https://t.co/itKA3ELG0g
The United States is working to protect the lives of all civilians and ensure humanitarian assistance can flow into Gaza. https://t.co/QcpOkRUoxg
.@StateDeptSpox provides an update on U.S. and international efforts to ensure civilians in Gaza have access to life-saving humanitarian aid. https://t.co/Vuc9TYFlwi
Watch @SecBlinken deliver remarks at the swearing-in ceremony for the President’s Advisory Council on African Diaspora Engagement, at the White House. https://t.co/qA744Z8S55
Live now: @SecBlinken delivers remarks at the Award for Corporate Excellence ceremony at the State Department. Also streaming at: https://t.co/qAgZUQNg8l  https://t.co/J4ZzVj0iqK

In “The Week at State,” @secblinken addresses the @un Security Council on the situation in the Middle East, international delegates tackle global food insecurity at @worldfoodprize’s Borlaug Dialogue, and @potus hosts Australian Prime Minister @albomp for a State Visit. https://t.co/QRp5IJlxsU

The people of Ukraine have demonstrated remarkable courage and resilience. The United States will continue to stand with them until Ukraine secures a just and durable peace. - @secblinken https://t.co/8tcS8S1Eeq

On the 25th Anniversary of the International Religious Freedom Act, we celebrate the global efforts supporting the right to freedom of religion or belief and redouble our commitment to stand with those persecuted on the basis of any religion or belief. https://t.co/1zzXA6LN3c

.@SecBlinken at the @UN: We must redouble our collective efforts to build an enduring political solution to the conflict between Israelis and Palestinians. The only road to lasting peace and security in the region is through two states for two peoples. https://t.co/NAWMXCne1A
Watch as @SecBlinken meets with People’s Republic of China Director of the CCP Central Foreign Affairs Commission and Foreign Minister Wang Yi at the StateDepartment. https://t.co/Wtv8Z9U5Qv
Watch as @SecBlinken delivers remarks at a signing ceremony for the U.S.-Australia Technology Safeguards Agreement at the State Department. https://t.co/dvNEgLdiGn
Live now: @SecBlinken and @VP Harris host a State luncheon in honor of Australian Prime Minister @AlboMP. Also streaming on YouTube at: https://t.co/GdnJfdnZLk https://t.co/v9HJvTpsed

The United States stands ready to work with anyone who’s ready to forge a more peaceful and secure future for the region – a future its people yearn for and so deserve. - @SecBlinken at the @UN Security Council Ministerial Meeting on the Situation in the Middle East https://t.co/maIMCtfa2L
“We all agree on the vital need to protect civilians.” —@SecBlinken https://t.co/kPyXCS9Obn
Welcome to the United States @AlboMP. #USwithAUS

The relationship between the United States and Australia has never been stronger – bolstered by cooperation on key issues and based on our shared values of defending freedom and democracy, championing opportunity, upholding human rights, and respecting the rule of law. https://t.co/oTtUMgAb5o

This week @POTUS and @FLOTUS are hosting Australian Prime Minister @AlboMP for an Official Visit, which will underscore the deep and enduring U.S.- Australia partnership and our shared commitment to supporting an open, stable, and prosperous Indo-Pacific. https://t.co/NFNZtGLGPj

The United States is hosting Australia for an official State Visit and #StateOnTheStreet is back with another episode – this time testing your knowledge of all things Australia. 🇺🇸 🇦🇺 https://t.co/8of9csSD7X

The U.S.-Australia relationship is underpinned by shared democratic values and common interests, with strong economic, academic, and people-to-people ties. Our partnership promotes peace and stability in the Indo-Pacific region and around the world. https://t.co/MXgIqyv0JC

Only by working together can we overcome the global food security challenges we face. We are joining 65+ countries at the 2023 Borlaug Dialogue to address issues that can help feed the world. https://t.co/TBnYQtOezA

The world needs agricultural innovation and leadership to address long-term food security challenges and mitigate the effects of climate change and conflict. As Nobel Peace Prize winning American agronomist Norman Borlaug noted, pessimism has no place in action.

78 years ago, the United Nations officially came into being with a commitment to maintaining international peace and security. Today, @SecBlinken delivered powerful remarks outlining the crucial role of member states in addressing the current crisis in the Middle East. https://t.co/YOVajFVeI2

78 years ago, leaders from 50 sovereign nations came together to sign the United Nations Charter. The @UN is the only global institution with human rights at its core — and as the world faces unprecedented challenges, cooperation for the common good is more important than ever. https://t.co/71Qv6dJFB1

"At the heart of our efforts to save innocent lives is our core belief that every civilian life is equally valuable. A civilian is a civilian is a civilian – no matter his or her nationality, ethnicity, age, gender, faith." - @SecBlinken https://t.co/dvchIRExrP
"Every one of us has a stake – everyone of us has a responsibility – in defeating terrorism." - @SecBlinken https://t.co/VTlqAsB6VW

Live now: @SecBlinken participates in a @UN Security Council Ministerial on the situation in the Middle East in New York. Also streaming on YouTube at: https://t.co/GK4QoBFQfS. https://t.co/hEHbfu3miw

We’re innovating and elevating our diplomacy to meet the challenges of today. At @FSIatState, @SecBlinken shared how our modernization agenda is progressing, from standing up new offices to engaging more with Americans. https://t.co/71gfvWRUlA
.@SecBlinken delivers remarks at the opening ceremony for a new innovative building at the Foreign Service Institute in Arlington, Virginia. Watch on YouTube: https://t.co/A8ORaeNOdP

To mark National Disability Employment Awareness Month, our colleagues share how the U.S. engages in disability-inclusive foreign policy and is working to create a world that embraces the full inclusion of persons with disabilities: https://t.co/NZrpGbltWE

In “The Week at State,” @SecBlinken continued his intensive engagements and travel in the Middle East, @Potus traveled to Israel to affirm U.S. support and solidarity, and the United States announced $100 million in humanitarian relief for the Palestinian people. https://t.co/OcVnORw8yb

.@SubnationalDip announced the creation of the Assembly of Local Leaders, which will connect mayors, governors, and other municipal leaders with State Department officials to address the global matters that impact our communities. https://t.co/00YWuLePVP

We stand for justice and we reject all forms of hate. @POTUS: When America experienced the hell of 9/11, we felt enraged as well. While we sought and got justice, we made mistakes. https://t.co/1rZTuAirES
We will continue to bring with us the promise of America, freedom, independence, self-determination. https://t.co/PtYXm5XRwZ
Together, we are helping Ukraine restore power and enabling the people of Ukraine to defend their homeland. https://t.co/cUI2RgfrtJ
We denounce antisemitism. We denounce Islamophobia https://t.co/AlNZNQSGga

Our message to Palestinians in Gaza, the West Bank, and all around the world is clear: we see you, we grieve with you, and we mourn every loss of innocent life. Civilians are not to blame and should not suffer for Hamas’s horrific terrorism. https://t.co/oIcI2PpPRd
.@SecBlinken delivers remarks on the release of two American citizens who Hamas held hostage since October 7. https://t.co/BvP61N3OQ8

Every single one of them should be released.

The President has made clear that he will do everything possible to secure the release of every hostage.

But there are still 10 additional Americans who remain unaccounted for in this conflict. We know that some of them are being held hostage by Hamas, along with an estimated 200 other hostages held in Gaza.

.@SecBlinken: About an hour ago, two American citizens held by Hamas since October 7 were released.

These two Americans are now safely in the hands of Israeli authorities in Israel. A team from the U.S. embassy will meet with them shortly.
Live now! @SecBlinken delivers remarks from the State Department. Also streaming at https://t.co/8kzTQK0QKl. https://t.co/TtHuguNjSM
Israel and Palestinians equally deserve to live in safety, dignity, and peace. We cannot give up on a two-state solution. — @POTUS https://t.co/DDXWHB1CUk
"Here in America, let us not forget who we are. We reject all forms of hate, whether it’s against Muslims, Jews, or anyone. That’s what great nations do—and we are a great nation." — @POTUS

$100 million of new U.S. humanitarian assistance for the Palestinian people will support more than 1 million displaced and conflict-affected Palestinians, including emergency needs in Gaza. https://t.co/CnE93RZfRP

Due to increased tensions in various locations around the world, we are advising U.S. citizens overseas to exercise increased caution.
🔴Stay alert in locations frequented by tourists
🔴Enroll in our Smart Traveler Enrollment Program https://t.co/LUiIr82ilp
🔴Follow @TravelGov

.@StateDeptSPOX recaps @SecBlinken's eight day trip through the Middle East, where he met on multiple occasions with senior officials from the government of Israel and the Palestinian Authority, as well as leaders in Bahrain, Egypt, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, UAE and Qatar. https://t.co/8GK1J8101r

.@POTUS: We must keep working for Israel’s greater integration with its neighbors. These attacks have only strengthened my commitment and determination and my will to get that done. https://t.co/W7zhXbtZoi
.@POTUS in Israel: We believe in the fundamental dignity of every human life. https://t.co/0o6CR4lnGV
“What sets us apart from the terrorists is we believe in the fundamental dignity of every human life — Israeli, Palestinian, Arab, Jew, Muslim, Christian — everyone.” - @POTUS https://t.co/lgsNWbkEtw

The U.S. is providing $100M in humanitarian assistance for the Palestinian people in Gaza and the West Bank. This funding will help support displaced & conflict-affected people with clean water, food, hygiene support, medical care, and other essential needs. https://t.co/wKwp1MxidV
.@POTUS: We mourn the loss of innocent Palestinian lives. The United States unequivocally stands for the protection of civilian life during conflict. https://t.co/5Mr549WfoO
“We mourn the loss of innocent Palestinian lives. The United States unequivocally stands for the protection of civilian life in conflict.” - @POTUS https://t.co/11Ueh3gfQg
.@POTUS is delivering remarks in Tel Aviv, Israel. Tune in now: https://t.co/CeALttlhAe

“The United States stands unequivocally for the protection of civilian life during conflict and we mourn the patients, medical staff and other innocents killed or wounded in this tragedy.” — @POTUS on the explosion at the Al Ahli Arab hospital in Gaza. https://t.co/ZdcDUmHcvq

If Hamas in any way blocks humanitarian assistance from reaching civilians, including by seizing the aid itself, we’ll be the first to condemn it and we will work to prevent it from happening again. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/KcdUlNIX7V

Israel has the right to defend its people and do everything it can to ensure that what happened last Saturday never happens again.

At the same time, the way Israel does this matters, taking every possible precaution to avoid harming civilians. https://t.co/IBz2oluAq7

Hamas is a terrorist group. Its only agenda is to destroy the state of Israel and to murder Jews. And it’s important that the entire world see it as such. This is an important moment for moral clarity when it comes to Hamas. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/5HcjUfbLFg

Today @SecBlinken announced that the U.S. and Israel have agreed to develop a plan that will enable humanitarian aid from donor nations and multilateral organizations to reach civilians in Gaza, including the possibility of creating areas to help keep civilians out of harm's way. https://t.co/6OKf1ZxuXj
.@SecBlinken is making remarks live now in Israel. https://t.co/FH3rPxB3m2
The Secretary departed for Israel where he meet with Israeli senior leadership, including Prime Minister Netanyahu and President Herzog.

Today, he began his day in Amman, Jordan, where he thanked our colleagues and staff from our various missions, including: @usembassyjlm, @usembassyjordan, @usembassydoha, @usembassymanama, @usainksa, @usainuae, and @usembassycairo. https://t.co/WViBP713ha
On Sunday, he met with Saudi Crown Prince and Prime Minister Mohammed bin Salman, and then headed to Egypt where he spoke with Egyptian President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi.

On Saturday, the Secretary was in Saudi Arabia where he met with Saudi Foreign Minister Prince Faisal Bin Farhan, and then later in the Abu Dhabi where he met with UAE President Sheikh Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan. https://t.co/2607msUnTW

.@SecBlinken continues intensive diplomacy in the Middle East to meet with our regional partners on Hamas’ terrorist attacks against Israel and our shared commitment to maintaining stability in the region. https://t.co/i6ncd5qET0

None of us want to see suffering by civilians on any side, whether it’s in Israel, whether it’s in Gaza, whether it’s anywhere else. And we’re working together to do our best to protect them. - @SecBlinken
There’s clear condemnation of the actions that Hamas has taken, the atrocities it’s committed, and a desire to find a way forward, a positive way forward. - @SecBlinken https://t.co/9Lp8v99E0r

As @POTUS said: “Democracies like Israel and the U.S. are stronger and more secure when we act according to the rule of law.” Israel has a right and an obligation to defend itself from Hamas’s brutality. Hamas’s disregard for human life has led to Palestinian suffering.

Hamas' brutal and violent terrorist attacks have compounded and perpetuated the suffering of the Palestinian people at every step of this crisis. As we stand with the people and government of Israel, we also stand with Palestinian civilians who are in harm’s way because of Hamas.

.@POTUS has appointed former Ambassador David Satterfield as the Special Envoy for Middle East Humanitarian Issues. This builds on the long-standing U.S. commitment to supporting peace and stability in the region.

In “The Week at State,” the United States responds to Hamas’ horrific attacks against Israel, @POTUS reiterates our steadfast support and solidarity with Israel, and @SecBlinken heads to Tel Aviv to meet with Israeli officials and citizens. https://t.co/ArTsAAxbVv

“We know Hamas didn’t commit its heinous acts with the interests of the Palestinian people in mind.” 
– @SecBlinken https://t.co/Mmr6sdGupW

.@SecBlinken: We mourn the loss of every innocent life – Israeli, Palestinian, Jew, Christian, Muslim, as well as civilians of every faith and every nationality who’ve been killed. https://t.co/lnKdt6JtFz
The Secretary landed in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia as his trip through the Middle East continues. https://t.co/4fmT2MhZOF

In Manama, he met with Bahraini Crown Prince-Prime Minister Salman bin Hamad Al Khalifa to strengthen our bilateral relationship, reassure our partners and allies, and deter adversaries in these challenging times. https://t.co/X0vCwPEIwI

He met with Qatari Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani about Hamas' terrorist attacks in Israel and advancing security and stability in the region. https://t.co/GB4YYbd5eq

In Doha, he met with Qatari Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani on to discuss the terrorist attacks and ongoing conflict with Hamas, and recognized Qatar’s diplomatic efforts to efforts to secure the return of hostages. https://t.co/dA1kGXa8kz

He met with Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas and reiterated that Hamas does not stand for the Palestinian people’s legitimate right to dignity, freedom, justice, and self-determination. https://t.co/WGNYXqNDqT
In Amman, he met with His Majesty King Abdullah II of Jordan to discuss the horrific Hamas attacks on Israel and efforts to prevent the conflict from widening. https://t.co/RZT29DQkHN

.@SecBlinken continued his travels today with stops in Jordan, Qatar, and Bahrain. He met with regional partners on efforts to prevent the conflict from spreading and our affirmative vision for a region that’s more peaceful, more prosperous, more secure, more integrated. https://t.co/MKWKN4W10s

We are continuing to closely monitor the situation in Israel and evaluate the demand from U.S. citizens for assistance in departing. The U.S. government is arranging charter flights to help facilitate the safe departure of thousands of U.S. citizens. https://t.co/cUwvbrEhiK https://t.co/nQz3PcCush
We know Hamas doesn’t represent the Palestinian people or their legitimate aspirations to live with equal measures of security, freedom, justice, opportunity, and dignity. https://t.co/8M0ERk71cN
We must stand together resolved to confront what is worst among humanity with what is best. https://t.co/P3wDu1n6QF
.@SecBlinken on an affirmative vision for a more peaceful, more stable region: https://t.co/cM00M7OZ2v

Starting October 13, we will secure charter flights to help U.S. citizens and immediate family members who have been unable to book commercial transit and seek a safe means of departing Israel. https://t.co/g3X8iTAGiS
We are inspired by the bravery of the Israeli people.
“This is pure evil.” — @SecBlinken on Hamas’ acts of terror against Israel. https://t.co/o3IPZek7TY
As long as there’s a United States, Israel will never be alone. https://t.co/Oi23sOfUlt
America stands with Israel. 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 https://t.co/dyC7LMUIKF

I’m standing here today, alongside our Israeli friends – and all those who reject terror – to help find the glimmers of light even in this moment of deep darkness. And to make clear that, as long as there’s a United States, Israel will never be alone. - @SecBlinken
I will continue pressing countries to help prevent the conflict from spreading, and to use their leverage to urge Hamas to immediately release its hostages and stop its attacks. - @SecBlinken
I came to Israel bearing a simple message: the United States stands with Israel and with its people. Today. Tomorrow. Every day. - @SecBlinken in Tel Aviv

Live now! @SecBlinken holds a press availability in Tel Aviv, Israel. Also streaming at: https://t.co/qMMBm1gpX5.
 https://t.co/b5o4K60j45

En route to Israel, @SecBlinken reiterates that the United States stands with Israel. In the face of this brutal terrorist attacking, we are working relentlessly to secure the release of hostages held by Hamas, whom we believe include American citizens. https://t.co/FVtRAGJkvA

The foremost goal of this travel is to show Israel that we stand with them, that we will be in solid support with them, that we will get them everything they need to defend themselves against this act of terrorism.  - @StateDeptSpox 
https://t.co/UpNfcFqHWN

The United States expresses our steadfast and united support for Israel, and our unequivocal condemnation of Hamas and its appalling acts of terrorism. Joint statement: https://t.co/dcYHMTQO5N https://t.co/BCOgUZdNUr
.@StateDeptSPOX explains what we are doing in response to the terrorist attacks launched by Hamas against Israel. https://t.co/iwTIcZqY5a
.@POTUS: Let there be no doubt—the United States has Israel’s back. https://t.co/1EwZYLBcGX
.@POTUS: There’s no justification for terrorism. Hamas does not stand for the Palestinian people’s right to dignity and self determination. https://t.co/K7MqlSvv9z
Live now! @StateDeptSpox briefs reporters from the State Department, also streaming at: https://t.co/ZRT8VJyFvs. https://t.co/bxkvXKZtPF
Live now! @POTUS delivers remarks on the terrorist attacks in Israel. Also streaming at: https://t.co/AkAXxcnN53. https://t.co/YmLG2U7uCQ
.@StateDeptSpox: Our focus right now is on addressing the crisis in Israel and doing everything to make sure Israel has what it needs to defend itself against these brutal terrorist attacks.
Latest updates on Israel, including information for U.S. citizens seeking to be in touch with the U.S. Embassy in Israel, can be found on our website linked below. https://t.co/TjHvqg1Vdn
On #IndigenousPeoplesDay, we honor those who have shaped our nation and are building a better world. https://t.co/zcJlwQTcUE
The United States unequivocally condemns the appalling attacks by Hamas terrorists against Israel. For the latest information on our response, visit: https://t.co/TjHvqg1nnP https://t.co/PJFNp6V7bJ

The #ArtemisAccords brings together 29 nations with a common vision for peaceful cooperation in space. We're writing a new chapter of space exploration for the benefit of all humankind. Learn more at https://t.co/kI0iYCS68H. #WorldSpaceWeek https://t.co/oUM8DiH1el

Science fiction is becoming jaw-dropping fact, largely thanks to collaboration among many nations. Launch into a real-life space adventure with @MarkHamill, who played Luke Skywalker in Star Wars, in our latest digital story: https://t.co/2yQJF9aiIQ https://t.co/JkcGmjopzH
Our relationship with Mexico is arguably the most important we have in terms of the practical impact that it has on the lives of our citizens every day. https://t.co/VJdCJ02iqS
Live now! @SecBlinken holds a U.S.-Mexico High-Level Security Dialogue joint press availability in Mexico City, Mexico. Also streaming at https://t.co/ATiX9nir0Y.  https://t.co/lvueAZkJjP

.@SecBlinken on the U.S.-Mexico relationship: Our two countries have a shared vision for our economic future, one that’s defined by fair competition, openness, transparency, measuring prosperity not only by how much countries grow but by how many people share in that growth. https://t.co/rLE1Fcme1J

.@SecBlinken is visiting Texas, but did you know that there is a U.S. diplomat assigned to Texas and many other U.S. states and regions? Diplomats in Residence provide guidance on careers, internships, and fellowships. Learn more:  https://t.co/5gM47JThmJ https://t.co/iExu8Cq7D3

Live now! @SecBlinken participates in a conversation at @UTAustin, moderated by former U.S. Ambassador to @NATO Kay Bailey Hutchison. Also streaming on YouTube at https://t.co/phkzY2C45S. https://t.co/7eL5kdeRrR

Live now! @SecBlinken participates in a conversation at Rice University’s @BakerInstitute for Public Policy moderated by Baker Institute for Public Policy Director Ambassador David Satterfield in Texas. Also streaming on YouTube: https://t.co/4MlCqyCj4K.  https://t.co/SJvZkMezt9

Diplomacy drives opportunity for Americans at home, including in Texas where @SecBlinken is visiting today. Check out how the work of the State Department benefits Texas and all of the United States. https://t.co/Cxu69G1QRW

Not only did Putin pull out of the Black Sea Grain Initiative, but Russia is now mining Ukraine’s fields, bombing its ports and rails, burning its silos.

The hungrier the world is, the more Moscow profits. https://t.co/EVXWQ9MnAt

The talented artist Devon Rodriguez recently sat down with @USAmbUN to discuss her role and the hope young people around the world give her: “Right now, young people are leading in ways that my generation didn’t lead.” https://t.co/tFPtq8O821

.@SecBlinken: The objective that President Putin set in Ukraine was to erase it from the map, to eliminate its independence, to subsume it into Russia. That failed a long time ago. https://t.co/NfnWG09b5U

American musical legends, like Marian Anderson, Charlie Byrd, and Duke Ellington, traveled the world as Cultural Ambassadors to promote peace and democracy through #MusicDiplomacy.

We recently uncovered rare archival footage from these tours:  https://t.co/7ZTGXhg4We
The partnership and extraordinarily close ties between the U.S. and the Republic of Korea is a testament to the democratic values and the vision for the world that we share. https://t.co/kP8k7rTnvL

The Atlantic Ocean connects and sustains us. More commercial and shipping traffic crosses the Atlantic than any other ocean. More data travels along its underwater cables than any other ocean. It’s home to more than half of the world’s fisheries. https://t.co/KSdgWFzDRh

.@SecBlinken: The U.S. and our partners are committed to making and demonstrating a stronger offer to countries in the region, and to developing countries around the world, working to deliver on the issues that actually matter in their lives. https://t.co/JvytSfPFZ1
